controls.control_objective: To ensure have ramifications for a range of other risk categories too
controls.control_description:
If not managed effectively, credit risk may have ramifications for a range
of other risk categories too.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have ramifications for a range of other risk categories too

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - credit risk management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
Banks - Credit Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - credit risk management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect immediately upon issuance
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect immediately upon issuance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rcbs' and individually as a 'rcb')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Rural Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'RCBs' and individually as a 'RCB').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rcbs' and individually as a 'rcb')

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean state co-operative banks (stcbs) and central co-operative banks (ccbs), as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act
controls.control_description:
In this context, rural co-operative banks shall mean State Co-operative Banks
(StCBs) and Central Co-operative Banks (CCBs), as defined in the National Bank
for Agriculture and Rural Development Act, 1981.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean state co-operative banks (stcbs) and central co-operative banks (ccbs), as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a facility, under which a customer is allowed an advance up to the credit limit against the security by way of hypothecation / pledge of goods, b
controls.control_description:
(i) 'Cash credit (CC)' shall mean a facility, under which a customer is allowed an advance
up to the credit limit against the security by way of hypothecation / pledge of goods, book
debts, standing crops, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to mean a facility, under which a customer is allowed an advance up to the credit limit against the security by way of hypothecation / pledge of goods, b

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as specified in section 188(1)(a) to (g) of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
The
outstanding amount is repayable on demand.]
2[(ia) 'Contract or arrangement' shall have the same meaning as specified in Section
188(1)(a) to (g) of the Companies Act, 2013.

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it under section 2(27) of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(ib) 'Control' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Section 2(27) of the
Companies Act, 2013.]
3[(ii) 'Current Account' shall mean a form of demand deposit account wherefrom
withdrawals are allowed any number of times depending upon the balance in the account
or up to a particular agreed amount and shall also be deemed to include other deposit
accounts which are neither Savings nor Term deposit account.]
4[(iia) 'Director of a RCB' shall have the same meaning as defined in Explanation (b) to
Section 20 of the Banking Regulation Act 1949 and would include a nominee director and
an independent director
(iib) 'Entity' shall mean a 'person' other than an individual and a Hindu Undivided Family.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it under section 2(27) of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean all employees one level below the board and any person designated as such by the board
controls.control_description:
(iic) 'Key Managerial Personnel (KMP)' of a RCB shall mean all employees one level
below the Board and any person designated as such by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean all employees one level below the board and any person designated as such by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean extending funded or/ and non- fund-based credit facilities to related parties
controls.control_description:
(iid) 'Lending' in the context of a related party shall mean extending funded or/ and non-
fund-based credit facilities to related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean extending funded or/ and non- fund-based credit facilities to related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be covered for this purpose, equity investments shall be excluded
controls.control_description:
While investments in debt instruments of
related parties shall be covered for this purpose, equity investments shall be excluded.]
5[(iii) 'Overdraft (OD)' shall mean a facility, under which a customer is allowed to draw an
agreed sum (credit limit) in excess of credit balance in their account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be covered for this purpose, equity investments shall be excluded

controls.control_objective: To ensure be secured (against fixed / term deposits and other securities, like small saving instruments, surrender value of insurance policies, etc
controls.control_description:
The overdraft facility
may be secured (against fixed / term deposits and other securities, like small saving
instruments, surrender value of insurance policies, etc.) or clean (i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be secured (against fixed / term deposits and other securities, like small saving instruments, surrender value of insurance policies, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it under section 3 (23) of part i of insolvency and bankruptcy code (ibc), 2016
controls.control_description:
The overdraft facility might be granted on their current account, savings
deposits account or temporary overdraft on credit accounts.]
6[(iv) 'Person' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Section 3 (23) of Part
I of Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (IBC), 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it under section 3 (23) of part i of insolvency and bankruptcy code (ibc), 2016

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined under banking statistics (harmonised definitions)
controls.control_description:
(v) 'Personal Loan' shall have the same meaning as defined under Banking Statistics
(Harmonised Definitions).

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it under section 2(69) of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(vi) 'Promoter' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Section 2(69) of the
Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it under section 2(69) of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure an individual who is either (a) a director (excluding independent director/ nominee director appointed by the government or rbi or a statutory body) o
controls.control_description:
(vii) 'Reciprocally Related Person' means an individual who is either (a) a director
(excluding independent director/ nominee director appointed by the Government or RBI
or a statutory body) of another Co-operative bank or (b) relatives of such directors or (c)
firms/companies in which such reciprocally related persons have interest/substantial
interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an individual who is either (a) a director (excluding independent director/ nominee director appointed by the government or rbi or a statutory body) o

related person, or any of the following entities:

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply in cases where the authority to nominate a director arises exclusively from a lending or financing arrangement
controls.control_description:
Provided that, nothing in sub-clause (e) above shall apply in cases where the authority to
nominate a director arises exclusively from a lending or financing arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply in cases where the authority to nominate a director arises exclusively from a lending or financing arrangement

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the advice, directions or instructions given in a professional capacity
controls.control_description:
Provided further that, nothing in sub-clause (f) above shall apply to the advice, directions
or instructions given in a professional capacity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the advice, directions or instructions given in a professional capacity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as related parties to a government-owned bank just by virtue of the fact that the government has the common ownership or control of such en
controls.control_description:
Provided further that, Government of India / State Government-owned or controlled
entities shall not be treated as related parties to a government-owned bank just by virtue
of the fact that the Government has the common ownership or control of such entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as related parties to a government-owned bank just by virtue of the fact that the government has the common ownership or control of such en

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a person, and the relatives of such a person
controls.control_description:
(ix) 'Related Person' with respect to a RCB shall mean a person, and the relatives of such
a person, where the person:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a person, and the relatives of such a person

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in section 2(77) of the companies act, 2013 and rules framed therein
controls.control_description:
(x) 'Relative' with regard to a natural person shall have the same meaning as defined in
Section 2(77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and rules framed therein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in section 2(77) of the companies act, 2013 and rules framed therein

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning assigned to it under clause (ne) of section 5 of the banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
(xii) 'Substantial interest' shall have the same meaning assigned to it under Clause (ne)
of Section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.]
7[(2)] All expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have been
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934 and rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-
enactment thereto or in other relevant regulations issued by the Reserve Bank or
Glossary of Terms published by Reserve Bank or as used in commercial parlance, as the
case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning assigned to it under clause (ne) of section 5 of the banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a comprehensive board approved policy on credit risk management
controls.control_description:
8[An RCB shall put in place a comprehensive Board approved policy on Credit Risk
Management.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a comprehensive board approved policy on credit risk management

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, cover aspects related to lending to related parties, valuation of properties including empanelment of valuers and maintenance of cash cr
controls.control_description:
The policy shall, inter alia, cover aspects related to lending to related
parties, valuation of properties including empanelment of valuers and maintenance of
cash credit accounts, current accounts and overdraft accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, cover aspects related to lending to related parties, valuation of properties including empanelment of valuers and maintenance of cash cr

controls.control_objective: To ensure suitably factor in the possible impact of calamities on borrowers who may be impacted by such events
controls.control_description:
Credit assessments carried out by a bank shall suitably factor in the possible impact of calamities on borrowers who may be impacted by such events.]
9Inserted with effect from July 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Rural Cooperative Banks - Credit Risk Management) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 dated April 29, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to suitably factor in the possible impact of calamities on borrowers who may be impacted by such events

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into any commitment for granting any loan or advance to or on behalf of - (1) any of its directors, (2) any firm in which any of its directors i
controls.control_description:
Advances to Banks' Directors
In terms of Section 20(1)(b) read with Section 56 of the BR Act, an RCB shall not
enter into any commitment for granting any loan or advance to or on behalf of -
(1) any of its directors,
(2) any firm in which any of its directors is interested as partner, manager, employee
or guarantor, or
(3) any company not being a subsidiary of the RCB or a company registered under
Section 8 of the Companies Act, 2013, or a Government company of which or the
subsidiary or the holding company of which any of the directors of the RCB is a
director, managing agent, manager, employee or guarantor or in which he holds
substantial interest, or
(4) any individual in respect of whom any of its directors is a partner or guarantor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into any commitment for granting any loan or advance to or on behalf of - (1) any of its directors, (2) any firm in which any of its directors i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be construed as either a 'company' or a 'firm'
controls.control_description:
(1) For the purposes of this Chapter of these Directions, co-operative entities, being
distinct legal structures governed by their own statutes, shall not be construed as
either a 'company' or a 'firm'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be construed as either a 'company' or a 'firm'

controls.control_objective: To ensure further renew such a facility on or after its contracted maturity or renewal date
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to further renew such a facility on or after its contracted maturity or renewal date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the prudential ceilings and norms prescribed for various loans to individuals in reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - credi
controls.control_description:
Provided that, the credit facilities mentioned at sub-paras (iv) and (v) above shall be
subject to the prudential ceilings and norms prescribed for various loans to individuals
in Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions,
2025 and Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks - Concentration Risk
Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the prudential ceilings and norms prescribed for various loans to individuals in reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - credi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be for investment in financial assets and the interest rate charged on all such loans shall not be lower than the rate charged to the employees
controls.control_description:
Provided further that, the purpose of loans mentioned at sub-paras (iv) and (v) above
shall not be for investment in financial assets and the interest rate charged on all such
loans shall not be lower than the rate charged to the employees.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be for investment in financial assets and the interest rate charged on all such loans shall not be lower than the rate charged to the employees

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fully secured by cash collateral of equivalent or higher value
controls.control_description:
(vi) Non-Fund Based (NFB) facility on behalf of a director or his/her related party,
provided that all such facilities shall be fully secured by cash collateral of equivalent
or higher value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fully secured by cash collateral of equivalent or higher value

controls.control_objective: To ensure , cash collateral would not be mandatory in exposure arising on account of derivative transactions
controls.control_description:
Provided that, cash collateral would not be mandatory in exposure arising on account
of derivative transactions.]
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , cash collateral would not be mandatory in exposure arising on account of derivative transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be void and of no effect
controls.control_description:
In terms of Section 20A(2) read with Section 56 of the Act ibid, any remission made
in contravention of the provisions of sub-section (1) above shall be void and of no
effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be void and of no effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure insist that borrower units with negative net worth / other irregularities draw and implement a time-bound realistic plan for bringing themselves back
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall insist that borrower Units with Negative Net worth / other
irregularities draw and implement a time-bound realistic plan for bringing
themselves back to normalcy / viability in operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to insist that borrower units with negative net worth / other irregularities draw and implement a time-bound realistic plan for bringing themselves back

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor such plans closely, and pending such revival, any fresh finance shall be subject to closer scrutiny and case by case review/approval by the bo
controls.control_description:
RCBs shall monitor such
plans closely, and pending such revival, any fresh finance shall be subject to closer
scrutiny and case by case review/approval by the Board / Competent Authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor such plans closely, and pending such revival, any fresh finance shall be subject to closer scrutiny and case by case review/approval by the bo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to obtention of government default guarantee for non-credit cooperative societies /government owned units, and against adequate collateral
controls.control_description:
Further, any credit facility to such units shall be subject to obtention of Government
Default Guarantee for non-credit cooperative societies /Government owned units,
and against adequate collateral security for the units outside the co-operative fold.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to obtention of government default guarantee for non-credit cooperative societies /government owned units, and against adequate collateral

controls.control_objective: To ensure grant credit facilities for certain activities / institutions, such as real estate, housing (except to the extent permitted by reserve bank), infrastr
controls.control_description:
Considering their resource pattern, priorities and the expertise available, an RCB
shall not grant credit facilities for certain activities / institutions, such as real estate,
housing (except to the extent permitted by Reserve Bank), infrastructure, power
schemes / projects especially where State Government's budgetary support is
available, and NBFCs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to grant credit facilities for certain activities / institutions, such as real estate, housing (except to the extent permitted by reserve bank), infrastr

controls.control_objective: To ensure desist from financing the commercial real estate (cre) sector
controls.control_description:
An RCB, in view of their primary role of lending for activities related to agriculture
and rural development, shall desist from financing the commercial real estate
(CRE) sector.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to desist from financing the commercial real estate (cre) sector

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that such exposures are well secured and adequate provisioning made
controls.control_description:
As regards the credit facilities already extended to this sector, it
should be ensured that such exposures are well secured and adequate
provisioning made, wherever required, as per the existing prudential guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that such exposures are well secured and adequate provisioning made

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be ensured that the credit facilities are not renewed
controls.control_description:
It
may also be ensured that the credit facilities are not renewed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be ensured that the credit facilities are not renewed

controls.control_objective: To ensure extend any financial assistance (including working capital funds) to nbfcs
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall not extend any financial assistance (including working capital funds)
to NBFCs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to extend any financial assistance (including working capital funds) to nbfcs

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to review the quality of their lending to non-credit cooperative societies / units outside the cooperative fold and individuals, on a quarter
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall continue to review the quality of their lending to non-credit
cooperative societies / units outside the cooperative fold and individuals, on a
quarterly basis and submit a Memorandum thereon to their Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to review the quality of their lending to non-credit cooperative societies / units outside the cooperative fold and individuals, on a quarter

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover, inter alia, details of sectoral / sub-sectoral credit limits / loans sanctioned, comments on operations on the major accounts on adequacy of margin, utilisation of the limit, end use of credit, irregularities
controls.control_description:
Such a review
may cover, inter alia, details of sectoral / sub-sectoral credit limits / loans
sanctioned, comments on operations on the major accounts on adequacy of
margin, utilisation of the limit, end use of credit, irregularities, if any, in the
operations of the unit or any other problems faced by the unit, etc., together with
the RCB's sectoral exposure and any other relevant issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to cover, inter alia, details of sectoral / sub-sectoral credit limits / loans sanctioned, comments on operations on the major accounts on adequacy of margin, utilisation of the limit, end use of credit, irregularities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to the relevant regional office of nabard
controls.control_description:
A copy of such review
notes may be submitted to the relevant Regional Office of NABARD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to the relevant regional office of nabard

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be given to the concerned stcb
controls.control_description:
In the case
of the CCBs, a copy may also be given to the concerned StCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be given to the concerned stcb

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the overall responsibility of ensuring that suitable mechanisms are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties b
controls.control_description:
The Board shall have the overall responsibility of ensuring that suitable mechanisms
are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties by the
bank.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have the overall responsibility of ensuring that suitable mechanisms are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties b

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related parties' in accordance with the provisions of these directions
controls.control_description:
The credit policy (hereinafter called the policy) of a bank, as required in terms of
the extant directions, shall contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related
parties' in accordance with the provisions of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related parties' in accordance with the provisions of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure prescribe, inter alia, additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from lending to related parties
controls.control_description:
The policy shall
prescribe, inter alia, additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from
lending to related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prescribe, inter alia, additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from lending to related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure also have specific provisions for lending to 'specified employees' of the bank and their relatives
controls.control_description:
The policy shall also have specific provisions for lending to 'specified employees'
of the bank and their relatives.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also have specific provisions for lending to 'specified employees' of the bank and their relatives

controls.control_objective: To ensure , (a) as a part of the whistleblowing mechanism, encourage employees to communicate confidentially and without the risk of reprisal, legitimate concerns
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , (a) as a part of the whistleblowing mechanism, encourage employees to communicate confidentially and without the risk of reprisal, legitimate concerns

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify aggregate limits for loans towards related parties
controls.control_description: The policy shall specify aggregate limits for loans towards related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specify aggregate limits for loans towards related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sub-limits for loans to a single related party and a group of related parties
controls.control_description:
Within this
aggregate limit, there shall be sub-limits for loans to a single related party and a
group of related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sub-limits for loans to a single related party and a group of related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be within the extant prudential exposure limits prescribed by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
These limits shall be within the extant prudential exposure
limits prescribed by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be within the extant prudential exposure limits prescribed by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake any lending transaction with the relatives of directors except credit facility fully secured by government securities, life insurance polici
controls.control_description:
RCB shall not undertake any lending transaction with the relatives of directors
except credit facility fully secured by government securities, life insurance policies
or fixed deposit standing in their own name.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake any lending transaction with the relatives of directors except credit facility fully secured by government securities, life insurance polici

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake any lending transaction with the firms / companies / concerns, as well as subsidiaries / holding companies thereof, in which the relatives o
controls.control_description:
RCBs shall not undertake any lending transaction with the firms / companies /
concerns, as well as subsidiaries / holding companies thereof, in which the
relatives of directors are interested, or have given surety / guarantee or hold
substantial interest or are in control of the company / firm.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake any lending transaction with the firms / companies / concerns, as well as subsidiaries / holding companies thereof, in which the relatives o

controls.control_objective: To ensure in terms of provisions of this chapter and chapter iii of these directions, or which have been permitted under power exercised by the reserve bank under clause (a) of the explanation under sub-section 4 of section 20 of the banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
Loans to related parties, which are not prohibited in terms of provisions of this
Chapter and Chapter III of these Directions, or which have been permitted under
power exercised by the Reserve Bank under clause (a) of the Explanation under
sub-section 4 of Section 20 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, except (i) credit
facilities fully secured by cash or liquid securities and (ii) inter-bank loans, shall be
subject to a materiality threshold as per the credit policy of the RCB, which shall
not be higher than the following ceilings:
Asset Size of the RCB Materiality Threshold Ceilings
>₹10,000 crore ₹75 lakh
₹3,000 crore - ₹10,000 crore ₹50 lakh
Upto ₹3,000 crore ₹25 lakh
16J.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in terms of provisions of this chapter and chapter iii of these directions, or which have been permitted under power exercised by the reserve bank under clause (a) of the explanation under sub-section 4 of section 20 of the banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure vary for different categories of loans to related parties as per the rcb's policy
controls.control_description:
Materiality thresholds may vary for different categories of loans to related parties as
per the RCB's policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to vary for different categories of loans to related parties as per the rcb's policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sanctioned by board of the rcb
controls.control_description:
All loans above the prescribed materiality threshold shall be sanctioned by Board of
the RCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sanctioned by board of the rcb

controls.control_objective: To ensure recuse themselves from deliberations and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving themselves or their related parties
controls.control_description:
Directors, KMP, or 'specified employees' shall recuse themselves from deliberations
and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving
themselves or their related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to recuse themselves from deliberations and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving themselves or their related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure also extend to deliberations and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such loans, including one-time settlements, wri
controls.control_description:
Such recusal shall also extend to deliberations
and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such
loans, including one-time settlements, write-offs, waivers, enforcement of security,
implementation of resolution plans, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also extend to deliberations and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such loans, including one-time settlements, wri

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as w
controls.control_description:
RCB shall put in place a suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically
updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as well
as the loan sanctioned by the bank to such related persons and related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as w

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted at quarterly or shorter intervals by internal auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans to re
controls.control_description:
Periodic reviews shall be conducted at quarterly or shorter intervals by internal
auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans
to related parties are being adhered to or not.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be conducted at quarterly or shorter intervals by internal auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans to re

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the audit committee of the board
controls.control_description:
Any deviation from the policy relating to lending to related parties and reasons
thereof shall be reported to the Audit Committee of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the audit committee of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure always be treated as lending to related party
controls.control_description:
Any product, entity or structure formed with the objective of circumventing these
Directions through various means, such as reciprocal lending or quid pro quo
arrangements, and identified as such by the auditors of the bank or by the
supervisory authority and investigating agencies shall always be treated as lending
to related party.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to always be treated as lending to related party

controls.control_objective: To ensure result in supervisory and enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Any non-compliance with and circumvention of these Directions shall result in
supervisory and enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the Reserve
Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to result in supervisory and enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure include imposition of monetary penalty, requirement of full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic audits, and r
controls.control_description:
These actions may include imposition of monetary penalty, requirement of
full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic
audits, and restrictions or any other supervisory and enforcement actions as
deemed fit.]
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include imposition of monetary penalty, requirement of full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic audits, and r

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the following aspects while formulating a policy on valuation of properties and appointment of valuers:
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall be guided by the following aspects while formulating a policy on
valuation of properties and appointment of valuers:
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be guided by the following aspects while formulating a policy on valuation of properties and appointment of valuers:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a board approved policy in place for valuation of properties including collaterals accepted for their exposures
controls.control_description:
Policy for valuation of properties
(1) An RCB shall have a Board approved policy in place for valuation of properties
including collaterals accepted for their exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a board approved policy in place for valuation of properties including collaterals accepted for their exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done by professionally qualified independent valuers i
controls.control_description: (2) The valuation shall be done by professionally qualified independent valuers i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done by professionally qualified independent valuers i

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a direct or indirect interest
controls.control_description: the valuer shall not have a direct or indirect interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a direct or indirect interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain minimum two independent valuation reports for properties valued at ₹50 crore or above
controls.control_description:
(3) An RCB shall obtain minimum two Independent Valuation Reports for properties
valued at ₹50 crore or above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain minimum two independent valuation reports for properties valued at ₹50 crore or above

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep the following aspects in view while formulating policy for revaluation of their own properties: (1) as an rcb is permitted to include revaluation
controls.control_description:
Revaluation of bank's own properties
In addition to the above, an RCB may keep the following aspects in view while
formulating policy for revaluation of their own properties:
(1) As an RCB is permitted to include revaluation reserves as part of Capital in terms
of Reserve Bank of India (Rural Cooperative Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital
Adequacy) Directions, 2025, it is necessary that revaluation reserves represent
true appreciation in the market value of the properties and banks have in place a
comprehensive policy for revaluation of fixed assets owned by them.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to keep the following aspects in view while formulating policy for revaluation of their own properties: (1) as an rcb is permitted to include revaluation

controls.control_objective: To ensure inter alia cover procedure for identification of assets for revaluation, maintenance of separate set of records for such assets, the frequency of reva
controls.control_description:
Such a policy
shall inter alia cover procedure for identification of assets for revaluation,
maintenance of separate set of records for such assets, the frequency of
revaluation, depreciation policy for such assets, policy for sale of such revalued
assets etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inter alia cover procedure for identification of assets for revaluation, maintenance of separate set of records for such assets, the frequency of reva

controls.control_objective: To ensure reflect the change in the fair value of the fixed asset, the frequency of revaluation shall be determined based on the observed volatility in the pric
controls.control_description:
(2) As the revaluation shall reflect the change in the fair value of the fixed asset, the
frequency of revaluation shall be determined based on the observed volatility in
the prices of the assets in the past.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reflect the change in the fair value of the fixed asset, the frequency of revaluation shall be determined based on the observed volatility in the pric

controls.control_objective: To ensure reflect the change in the expected pattern of consumption of the future economic benefits of the assets
controls.control_description:
Further, any change in the method of
depreciation shall reflect the change in the expected pattern of consumption of the
future economic benefits of the assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reflect the change in the expected pattern of consumption of the future economic benefits of the assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to these principles meticulously while changing the frequency of revaluation / method of depreciation
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall adhere to these principles
meticulously while changing the frequency of revaluation / method of depreciation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to these principles meticulously while changing the frequency of revaluation / method of depreciation

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a procedure for empanelment of professional valuers and maintain a register / record of 'approved list of valuers'
controls.control_description:
Policy for Empanelment of Independent valuers
(1) An RCB shall have a procedure for empanelment of professional valuers and
maintain a register / record of 'approved list of valuers'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a procedure for empanelment of professional valuers and maintain a register / record of 'approved list of valuers'

controls.control_objective: To ensure prescribe a minimum qualification for empanelment of valuers
controls.control_description: (2) An RCB may prescribe a minimum qualification for empanelment of valuers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prescribe a minimum qualification for empanelment of valuers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prescribed for different classes of assets (e
controls.control_description: Different qualifications may be prescribed for different classes of assets (e.g.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prescribed for different classes of assets (e

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into consideration the qualifications prescribed under section 34ab (rule 8a) of the wealth tax act, 1957
controls.control_description:
While prescribing the
qualification, an RCB shall take into consideration the qualifications prescribed
under Section 34AB (Rule 8A) of the Wealth Tax Act, 1957.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into consideration the qualifications prescribed under section 34ab (rule 8a) of the wealth tax act, 1957

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be guided by the relevant accounting standard issued by the institute of chartered accountants of india
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall also be guided by the relevant Accounting Standard issued by the
Institute of Chartered Accountants of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be guided by the relevant accounting standard issued by the institute of chartered accountants of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be noted that under the provisions of section 23 of the sarfaesi act, every transaction of security interest is required to be filed with the registry
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that under the provisions of Section 23 of the SARFAESI
Act, every transaction of security interest is required to be filed with the Registry.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be noted that under the provisions of section 23 of the sarfaesi act, every transaction of security interest is required to be filed with the registry

controls.control_objective: To ensure all be used as transaction accounts by the customers, which raises concerns relating to credit monitoring by the lenders
controls.control_description:
Current Accounts, Cash Credit Accounts (CC), and Overdraft Accounts (OD) may
all be used as transaction accounts by the customers, which raises concerns relating
to credit monitoring by the lenders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to all be used as transaction accounts by the customers, which raises concerns relating to credit monitoring by the lenders

controls.control_objective: To ensure include commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks, and regional rural banks, but excluding payments banks), urban co-operative
controls.control_description:
Explanation (1): 'Banking System' for the purpose of this Chapter shall include
Commercial Banks (including Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks, and Regional
Rural Banks, but excluding Payments Banks), Urban Co-operative Banks and Rural
Co-operative Banks (State Co-operative Banks and Central Co-operative Banks).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks, and regional rural banks, but excluding payments banks), urban co-operative

controls.control_objective: To ensure the sum of all sanctioned fund-based credit facilities and non-fund-based facilities availed by the borrower from the banking system
controls.control_description:
Explanation (2): 'Exposure' for the purpose of this Chapter means the sum of all
sanctioned fund-based credit facilities and non-fund-based facilities availed by the
borrower from the banking system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the sum of all sanctioned fund-based credit facilities and non-fund-based facilities availed by the borrower from the banking system

controls.control_objective: To ensure the bank has either: explanation: 'collection account' for the purpose of this chapter means a current account or od account used primarily for receip
controls.control_description:
In case of customers to whom the exposure of the banking system is ₹10 crore or
more:
(1) A bank may maintain current accounts or OD accounts as per the needs of the
customer provided that the bank has either:
Explanation: 'Collection Account' for the purpose of this Chapter means a current
account or OD account used primarily for receipts of cash inflows of the
accountholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the bank has either: explanation: 'collection account' for the purpose of this chapter means a current account or od account used primarily for receip

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the conditions outlined in paragraph 25f of these directions
controls.control_description:
Restricted payments / cash outflows from such account shall be
subject to the conditions outlined in paragraph 25F of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the conditions outlined in paragraph 25f of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure include additional covenants as per their policies in their loan agreements in mutual agreement with borrowers
controls.control_description:
With a view to ensuring credit discipline, lenders may include additional covenants
as per their policies in their loan agreements in mutual agreement with borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include additional covenants as per their policies in their loan agreements in mutual agreement with borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide such cash credit facilities as per the needs of the customer, without any restriction under this chapter
controls.control_description:
A bank may provide such cash credit facilities as per the needs of the
customer, without any restriction under this Chapter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide such cash credit facilities as per the needs of the customer, without any restriction under this chapter

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain current account or od account without any restriction in cases where the aggregate exposure of the banking system to the customer is less tha
controls.control_description:
A bank may maintain current account or OD account without any restriction in
cases where the aggregate exposure of the banking system to the customer is less
than ₹10 crore.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain current account or od account without any restriction in cases where the aggregate exposure of the banking system to the customer is less tha

controls.control_objective: To ensure be remitted within two working days of receipt of such funds to a cc account, current account, or od account maintained with any bank in the banking s
controls.control_description:
Funds credited into a collection account shall be remitted within two working days
of receipt of such funds to a CC account, current account, or OD account maintained
with any bank in the banking system and designated by the borrower for this purpose
(hereinafter referred to as 'designated account' in this Chapter).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be remitted within two working days of receipt of such funds to a cc account, current account, or od account maintained with any bank in the banking s

controls.control_objective: To ensure be through the designated account only
controls.control_description:
Any disbursement of
overdraft limit from an OD account, which is in the nature of a collection account, shall
be through the designated account only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be through the designated account only

controls.control_objective: To ensure statutory dues such as taxes, and dues
controls.control_description:
Provided that statutory dues such as taxes, and dues, if any, to the bank maintaining
the collection account may be debited before remitting the funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to statutory dues such as taxes, and dues

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the accounts mentioned below: (1) accounts opened as per the provisions of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (fema) and notificat
controls.control_description:
The restrictions placed in terms of paragraph 25D(1) of these Directions shall not
be applicable to the accounts mentioned below:
(1) Accounts opened as per the provisions of Foreign Exchange Management Act,
1999 (FEMA) and notifications issued thereunder, including accounts mandated
for ensuring compliance under the FEMA framework.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the accounts mentioned below: (1) accounts opened as per the provisions of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (fema) and notificat

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that transactions in such accounts are used only for the permitted / specified purposes
controls.control_description:
Provided that banks operating the above-mentioned exempted accounts shall
ensure that transactions in such accounts are used only for the permitted /
specified purposes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that transactions in such accounts are used only for the permitted / specified purposes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be remitted to the designated account
controls.control_description:
Surplus funds, if any, in such accounts shall be remitted to
the designated account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be remitted to the designated account

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor accounts maintained with them on a regular basis, and in any case at least once every half-year
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of ensuring ongoing compliance with this Chapter, all banks shall
monitor accounts maintained with them on a regular basis, and in any case at least
once every half-year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor accounts maintained with them on a regular basis, and in any case at least once every half-year

controls.control_objective: To ensure notify the customer(s) concerned promptly, and in any case within one month from the date of observing such ineligibility, that the account must eithe
controls.control_description:
then the bank shall notify the customer(s) concerned promptly, and in any case within
one month from the date of observing such ineligibility, that the account must either
be converted to a collection account or closed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to notify the customer(s) concerned promptly, and in any case within one month from the date of observing such ineligibility, that the account must eithe

controls.control_objective: To ensure be completed within three months of observing such ineligibility
controls.control_description:
The conversion or closure process, as
the case may be, shall be completed within three months of observing such
ineligibility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be completed within three months of observing such ineligibility

controls.control_objective: To ensure be appropriately flagged in the bank's core banking solution (cbs) to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring
controls.control_description:
Accounts opened in terms of these Directions shall be appropriately flagged in the
bank's core banking solution (CBS) to ensure clear identification and to facilitate
effective monitoring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be appropriately flagged in the bank's core banking solution (cbs) to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that such accounts and transactions and cashflows therein are monitored at the borrower level as also at the account level
controls.control_description:
Banks maintaining multiple accounts for a borrower shall ensure
that such accounts and transactions and cashflows therein are monitored at the
borrower level as also at the account level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that such accounts and transactions and cashflows therein are monitored at the borrower level as also at the account level

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that an accountholder utilise their account solely for transactions related to their authorised business or activities
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that an accountholder utilise their account solely for
transactions related to their authorised business or activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that an accountholder utilise their account solely for transactions related to their authorised business or activities

controls.control_objective: To ensure not, under any circumstances, be used as pass-through channels for facilitating third- party transactions
controls.control_description:
These accounts shall
not, under any circumstances, be used as pass-through channels for facilitating third-
party transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to not, under any circumstances, be used as pass-through channels for facilitating third- party transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure entities expressly licensed or authorised by a financial sector regulator to facilitate third-party transactions may continue to do so
controls.control_description:
Provided that entities expressly licensed or authorised by a financial sector regulator
to facilitate third-party transactions may continue to do so.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to entities expressly licensed or authorised by a financial sector regulator to facilitate third-party transactions may continue to do so

controls.control_objective: To ensure strictly be limited to the specific transactions they are authorised to do and shall not extend beyond that scope
controls.control_description:
However, such activities
shall strictly be limited to the specific transactions they are authorised to do and shall
not extend beyond that scope.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strictly be limited to the specific transactions they are authorised to do and shall not extend beyond that scope

controls.control_objective: To ensure be appropriately flagged in the bank's cbs to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring
controls.control_description:
Any account that has been permitted to carry out such
third-party transactions shall be appropriately flagged in the bank's CBS to ensure
clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be appropriately flagged in the bank's cbs to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that an accountholder, who is not licensed or authorised by the reserve bank to accept deposits or to provide payment services, do not engage i
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that an accountholder, who is not licensed or authorised by
the Reserve Bank to accept deposits or to provide payment services, do not engage
in such activities through accounts maintained with them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that an accountholder, who is not licensed or authorised by the reserve bank to accept deposits or to provide payment services, do not engage i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be implemented to detect the above prohibited usage, including mechanisms to flag accounts exhibiting unusually high transaction volumes, frequent pas
controls.control_description:
Robust monitoring systems shall be implemented to detect the above prohibited
usage, including mechanisms to flag accounts exhibiting unusually high transaction
volumes, frequent pass-through activities, or inconsistencies between the
accountholder's stated line of business and transactions carried out through the
account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be implemented to detect the above prohibited usage, including mechanisms to flag accounts exhibiting unusually high transaction volumes, frequent pas

controls.control_objective: To ensure preferably be remitted directly to the intended beneficiary's account(s) or for the specified end-use
controls.control_description:
Term loans sanctioned by the bank shall preferably be remitted directly to the
intended beneficiary's account(s) or for the specified end-use, where such beneficiary
is identifiable, rather than routing the funds through the borrower's account.]
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to preferably be remitted directly to the intended beneficiary's account(s) or for the specified end-use

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines
already repealed shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued,
or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if
those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
